text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I come across Agnes Digital's<n>student handbook
while on a stroll,<n>and look around for where she
could<n>have gone.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff! I h-have everythingin order—it's perfect. With this, I'mready to cheer on my Umamusumeidols!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Time to unleash my ultimate fan<n>chant!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Eeek?! Ow...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hyagghgh?! Nononono! Did I just<n>bump into
you?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Huh? No, not at all! I got caught on a<n>tree branch,
that's all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh, o-okay. Stay safe...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Siiiigh... I think I got a little toocarried away in this beautiful Umaparadise.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Like, what if she'd actually gotten<n>hurt because
of me...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Gyaagh! I could never live with<n>myself! I would
have to abandon my<n>otaku life!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hey! Shut the hell up already!I'm trying to write some new codeover—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohmygooosh! Shakur, you're way too<n>cool! Wild
and cool!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I said shut it! You keep fidgeting and<n>flailing
around... Would it kill you to<n>think to yourself
quietly?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Meep! Y-you heard me?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch. What's the deal, anyway? You<n>were
rambling about abandoning your<n>otaku stuff.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If you can throw away your passions<n>that
easily... I guess they didn't mean<n>that much to
you after all, huh?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Gasp. I... I could never! Simping ismy life!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: B-but, I feel like I should get my acttogether. I mean, this is theTracen Academy...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You're such a pain. No one cares as<n>long as you
stay in your lane and<n>don't cause any issues.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Skills are skills. The only difference<n>between data
hacking and data<n>cracking is how those skills are
used.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So you mean like... like setting<n>boundaries
between my racing and<n>my fangirling?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm saying that watching someone'll<n>show you
when to strike, and thinking<n>like 'em will show
you where.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The people who can do both—they're<n>the real
ones.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wait! I see... I'm starting to get it now,<n>Shakur!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: So, if I've got this right, the mostimportant thing is to consider whoI'm using my skills for!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
When I'm cheering on my beloved<n>Umas as a
fan, I'll shout out my love<n>at the very top of my
lungs!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And it's important use that<n>knowledge to
understand how my<n>fans feel so I can prepare
myself<n>better for races!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh... Thanks a lot, Shakur! I'll love<n>my Umas
for as long as I live!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah, great. Now can it and<n>leave me alone
already.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna cheer for you with my<n>ultimate fan
chants at your winning<n>concerts too, Shakur!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Mragh?! Why me?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Don't you worry! I promise I'll do my<n>best to not
cause a scene! I stake my<n>honor as an otaku on
it!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: No—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: NO ONE ASKED YOU TO DO THAT!
